title: Football Collapsible Water Bottle - 550ml Silicone Bottle With Football, Footi Boot Keyring & Carry Strap
features: Collapsible Water Bottle Fits Everywhere: Our collapsible water bottle is ideal for any activity-filled day on the go. Shrink it to a tiny 200ml football and place in your son’s or daughter’s backpack or expand to the full 550ml when needed!

Encourage Your Child To Drink More Water: Our reusable water bottle is great for encouraging hydration on hot summer days. Our squeezable water bottle is fun to drink from and show off to friends - enough to forget the need for sodas!

Don’t Leave Home Without Your Sports Bottle: Football practice, school, or a field trip - our silicone water bottle is perfect for carrying around! Light and compact to save space, the collapsible bottle also comes with a carabiner clip to attach to a bag or belt!

Reduce Plastic Waste: Personalised water bottles for kids are great alternatives to single use plastic bottles! Easy to wash and extremely durable, our children's water bottle can be used for years, taking care of your family and the environment!

Surprise Your Kid With A Great Gift: Our sports-themed drinking water bottle is a unique present for any football enthusiast. Great birthday gifts for boys and girls. Our school water bottles for kids are completely safe (BPA free) and child-friendly with a leak proof design. Add the water bottles for girls and boys to their lunch box to make sure they always stay hydrated.
description: Product Description Introducing The Must Have Collapsible Football Water Bottle By RIXOZ! The Secret to Convincing Your Kids to Drink More Water is Here! The Rixoz brand was born from our desire to make it easier for parents to help kids adopt healthy and sustainable habits that will make their life better. We know that convincing your little one to drink water is difficult, especially when the shops offer a wide range of sugary soda that your kiddo will always crave. But why not turn water drinking into a fun and exciting game with our football bottle? Put it in his or her backpack and shortly enough, your kiddo will be asking for a refill! Top 3 Reasons Why Parents Choose Our Product Durable and long-Lasting : The water bottle is made with food-grade and BPA-free silicone. This means that you can fold it as you please. No More Leaks and Spills : Not only is this water bottle completely leakproof, but the built-in foldable spout makes it super easy to drink even for the clumsy kid who always used to stain his clothes. Rinse and Reuse : It is important to keep everything your kids use clean and neat, but with our water bottle things couldn’t have been easier! Just wash the bottle by hand or in the dishwasher and reuse it day after day. This also means that you won’t have to waste money on bottled water that is also a danger to the environment. Misplacing Or Loosing Your Bottle ? Grab a pen and write down your name on the bottom of the bottle so that your bottle can be returned safely if misplaced. Clip & Go Hang the bottle on your bag or pram so you never loose your water bottle again while you are at school or gone out for a fun day. Football Keyring & Spout Brush Fun football keyring, football shoe keyring, carry strap & Cleaning brush provided to keep spout clean. Strong & Resistant The bottle body is made of food silicone, which is resistant to falling. Additional features Carabiner Clip Football Keyring Spout Brush Not Convinced Yet? · Material: Food Grade Silicone + PP Lid · Capacity: 550ml · Made Of BPA-Free Silicone · Flip Top Spout · Clip & Go What Are You Waiting For?
